case_title: JIMMY ORELLANA ET AL VS. AMAZON.COM SERVICE LLC

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM SERVICE LLC
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT RE: EXHIBITS SUBMITED DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT STAMPED "FILED BY FAX" FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM SERVICE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-11-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JIMMY ORELLANA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AUGUSTIN ORELLANA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM SERVICE LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYECHU, PROGRAM SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EXPRESSED AN INTEREST IN COMING TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. HONORABLE MICHELE MCGILL REQUESTS THAT THE PLAINTIFF AT LEAST HEAR WHAT AMAZON OFFERS. DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF JIMMY ORELLANA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AGUSTIN ORELLANA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM SERVICE LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU PROGRAM SPECIALIST VIA ZOOM. **ALL PARTIES GAVE ORAL AURTHORIZATION STIPULATING CASSE TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG**. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
